 Ukulayisha noma ukudonsa okungaphephile kungabangela izinhlawulo kanye nengozi eyengeziwe yokuphahlazeka.

 Abashayeli kumele balalele yonke imithetho efanele yokudonsa nokulayisha.

 Imithwalo yemfanelo yezomthetho isiza ekuvikeleni bonke abasebenzisi bomgwaqo.

category: Ukuqwashisa Ngemithwalo, Ukudonsa kanye Nezimoto Ezinzima
description:
Abashayeli abadonsa imithwalo noma abahamba eduze kwezimoto ezisindayo kufanele banikeze isikhala nesikhathi esengeziwe.

 Izimoto ezinkulu zingadinga indawo eyengeziwe yokujika noma ukushintsha imizila.

 Izimo zomgwaqo zingathinta ukuzinza kwezimoto lapho zithwala imithwalo.

 Isineke nokuqwashisa kuthuthukisa ukusebenzisana okuphephile komgwaqo.

category: Ukuqwashisa Ngemithwalo, Ukudonsa kanye Nezimoto Ezinzima
description:
Iziphathimandla zingahlola izimoto, ama-trailer, kanye nemithwalo ukuze ziqinisekise ukuthi ziyahambisana nokuphepha.

 Ukulayisha noma ukudonsa okungaphephile kungabangela izinhlawulo, izinhlawulo, noma izinkinga zezimoto.

 Imithetho yemigwaqo ikhona ukuze kuncishiswe izingozi ezihlobene nezimoto ezisindayo kanye nemithwalo.

 Abashayeli kufanele baqinisekise ukuthi imithwalo kanye nokusetha ukudonsa kuhambisana nezidingo zomthetho.

category: Ukuqwashisa Ngemithwalo, Ukudonsa kanye Nezimoto Ezinzima
description:
Ukulawulwa kokudonsa nokulayisha okuphephile kudinga ukuhlela, ukuqaphela, nokushayela ngokucophelela.

 Abashayeli kufanele bahlole njalo imithwalo, ama-trailer, kanye nesimo semoto.

 Ukunciphisa isivinini nokwandisa ibanga lokulandela kuthuthukisa ukuphepha.

 Ukushayela ngokwethembeka kusiza ukuvikela bonke abasebenzisi bomgwaqo lapho bethwala imithwalo noma beyidonsa.

category: Imithetho Yokunikeza Amalayisense, Yomfundi kanye Nemithetho Ye-P-Plate (ACT)
description:
Amakilasi ahlukene elayisensi avumela abashayeli ukuthi basebenzise izinhlobo ezahlukene zezimoto.

 Abashayeli kumele babe nesigaba selayisensi esifanele semoto abayishayelayo.

 Amakilasi elayisensi angafaka izimoto, izithuthuthu, izimoto ezisindayo, nezinye izinhlobo zezimoto.

 Ukushayela ngaphandle kwesigaba selayisensi esifanele kuyicala.

category: Imithetho Yokunikeza Amalayisense, Yomfundi kanye Nemithetho Ye-P-Plate (ACT)
description:
Abashayeli abafundayo kumele balandele yonke imibandela yelayisensi yokufunda.

 Abafundi kudingeka bashayele beqashwe ngumshayeli onelayisensi efanele.

 Abashayeli abafundayo kumele balalele imithetho yomgwaqo futhi babonise ama-L-plate ngendlela efanele.

 Ukuzijwayeza ukushayela ngokuphepha kusiza ekuthuthukiseni amakhono nolwazi lokushayela.

category: Imithetho Yokunikeza Amalayisense, Yomfundi kanye Nemithetho Ye-P-Plate (ACT)
description:
Abashayeli abafundi kumele babonise ngokucacile ama-L-plates ngenkathi beshayela.

 Ama-L-plates asiza abanye abasebenzisi bomgwaqo ukuthi babone abashayeli abafundi.

 Ama-plates kufanele abonakale ngaphambili nangemuva kwemoto njengoba kudingeka.

 Ukwehluleka ukubonisa ama-L-plates ngendlela efanele kungabangela izinhlawulo.

category: Imithetho Yokunikeza Amalayisense, Yomfundi kanye Nemithetho Ye-P-Plate (ACT)
description:
Abashayeli besikhashana kumele balandele imibandela esebenza kumalayisense abo.

 Imibandela ingafaka imikhawulo ephathelene nesivinini, abagibeli, utshwala, kanye namaselula.

 Ama-P-plate kumele aboniswe kahle lapho kudingeka khona.

 Ukwephula imibandela yelayisensi yesikhashana kungaholela ekujezisweni noma esenzweni selayisensi.

category: Imithetho Yokunikeza Amalayisense, Yomfundi kanye Nemithetho Ye-P-Plate (ACT)
description:
Abashayeli abafundi kanye nabashayeli besikhashana bangase babhekane nemithetho eqinile yocingo oluphathwayo.

 Ukusebenzisa ifoni ephathekayo ngenkathi ushayela kungaphazamisa ukunaka emgwaqweni.

 Abashayeli kumele balandele imikhawulo yocingo oluphathwayo esebenza ohlotsheni lwelayisensi yabo.

 Ukugwema iziphazamiso kusiza ekuthuthukiseni ukuphepha emgwaqweni.

category: Imithetho Yokunikeza Amalayisense, Yomfundi kanye Nemithetho Ye-P-Plate (ACT)
description:
Imikhawulo yabagibeli ingasebenza kwabanye abashayeli besikhashana.

 Le mithetho yenzelwe ukunciphisa ukuphazamiseka kanye nengozi yokuphahlazeka kwabashayeli abangenalo ulwazi oluningi.

 Abashayeli kumele baqonde futhi bahambisane nanoma yimiphi imibandela yabagibeli ehambisana nelayisensi yabo.

 Ukuphathwa kwabagibeli okuphephile kuthuthukisa ukuphepha kokushayela.

category: Imithetho Yokunikeza Amalayisense, Yomfundi kanye Nemithetho Ye-P-Plate (ACT)
description:
Abashayeli abafundayo kungadingeka baqede amahora okushayela aqondiwe ngaphambi kokuqhubekela esigabeni esilandelayo selayisensi.

 Ukuzijwayeza ezimweni ezahlukene zethrafikhi kanye nesimo sezulu kusiza ekwakheni ulwazi lokushayela.

 Ukuqoshwa okunembile kwamahora okushayela kungadingeka.

 Ukuzijwayeza okuqondisiwe kusekela amakhono okushayela aphephile.

category: Imithetho Yokunikeza Amalayisense, Yomfundi kanye Nemithetho Ye-P-Plate (ACT)
description:
Amaphuzu okwehluleka ayasebenza lapho abashayeli benza amacala athile omgwaqo.

 Ukuqongelela amaphuzu amaningi kakhulu okwehluleka kungabangela ukumiswa kwelayisensi noma ezinye izinhlawulo.

 Abashayeli abafundi kanye nabashayeli besikhashana bangase babe nemikhawulo ephansi yamaphuzu okwehluleka.

 Ukushayela okuphephile nokusemthethweni kusiza abashayeli ukuba bagweme izinhlawulo.

category: Imithetho Yokunikeza Amalayisense, Yomfundi kanye Nemithetho Ye-P-Plate (ACT)
description:
Abashayeli abafundi kanye nabashayeli besikhashana kungadingeka baqedele izivivinyo noma balondoloze ama-logbook.

 Izivivinyo zokushayela zihlola ulwazi namakhono okushayela okuphephile.

 Ama-logbook asiza ukuqopha ulwazi lokushayela oluqondisiwe lapho kudingeka khona.

 Amarekhodi anembile kanye nokulungiselela kusekela ukuqhubekela phambili kwelayisensi okuphumelelayo.

category: Imithetho Yokunikeza Amalayisense, Yomfundi kanye Nemithetho Ye-P-Plate (ACT)
description:
Abashayeli kumele balandele yonke imibandela yelayisensi kanye nemithetho yomgwaqo.

 Imibandela yelayisensi iyizidingo zomthetho futhi kumele ilandelwe ngaso sonke isikhathi.

 Ukwehluleka ukuthobela kungaholela ezinhlawulweni, amaphuzu okuncishiswa, noma ekumisweni kwelayisensi.

 Ukushayela ngokwethembeka kusekela imigwaqo ephephile kuwo wonke umuntu.

category: Imithetho Yokunikeza Amalayisense, Yomfundi kanye Nemithetho Ye-P-Plate (ACT)
description:
Ukushayela ngokuphepha kudinga ulwazi, isineke, ukuqaphela, kanye nokuziphatha okunesibopho.

 Abafundi kanye nabashayeli besikhashana kufanele baqhubeke nokuthuthukisa imikhuba yokushayela ngokuphephile.

 Ukuqonda nokulandela imithetho yomgwaqo kusiza ekunciphiseni ingozi yezingozi.

 Abashayeli abanomthwalo wemfanelo basiza ekudaleni imigwaqo ephephile kubo bonke abasebenzisi bomgwaqo.
